reviews.comment:
El sábado la encargada de cobrar , de muy mal humor, tardó casi media hora en cobrar y no había gente

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday, the cashier, in a very bad mood, took almost half an hour to collect payments and there were no people around.

reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy amables, en el bar no me dieron tiket y no me hicieron descuento x ser socio del ACA, muy deshonesta la persona que me atendio.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very friendly, but at the bar they didn't give me a ticket and didn't give me a discount for being an ACA member; the person who served me was very dishonest.
